LanguageData.WNA_Research_Dialog: As for the difficulties we've encountered in our research ...
LanguageData.WNA_OptionDesc_Dialog: "We know that hard situation you are experiencing." the Archonpriest seems already knows what we want to ask. \n\n"Our assist won't be free. 2357 silver, and your faith, that's enough."
LanguageData.WNA_FinalWarning_Dialog: "May you follow the right path." WARNING: some price will be paid. This will cost you 2357 silver, but your faction will be converted to Whelingnorther Alliance. If you are concerned about your faction ideology, please THINK CAREFULLY before you continue. Surely you can choose an alternate option, this way WNA won't take your ideo, but they will re-consider their relation with us.
LanguageData.WNA_OptionWellKnown_Dialog: We've seen the risks, and willing to pay the price.
LanguageData.WNA_AltOption_Dialog: I think out ideology is more important ...
LanguageData.WNA_OptionDoneDesc_Dialog: We have paid the appropriate price, and Whelingnorther Alliance has provided the appropriate reward. We have completed the research we needed.
